CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Preference And Trial Setting
Off Calendar Feb-16-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion & Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF DAVID NUGENT'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction IS DENIED. THE REMEDY IS MONETARY DAMAGES AND PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO CARRY HIS BURDEN OF DEMONSTRATING COGNIZEABLE IRREPRABLE INJURY IN ABSENCE OF REQUESTED MANDATORY INJUNCTION. LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS IS UNCERTAIN. IN ANY EVENT, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN SUCH A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS AS TO OVERCOME THE FAILURE TO DEMONSTRATE IRREPRABLE INJURY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR # 1558

Notice Of Motion & Motion For Preliminary Injunction

PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT COURTESY COPY OF MOVING PAPERS PER LOCAL RULES. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
